core_principles: Authority through Contrast: Deep Black vs. Metallic Gold.
Industrial Precision: Dense information, sharp lines, no fluff.
Trust & Compliance: Clean whitespace, clear status indicators.
Mobile Utility: The Worker App is a tool, not a brochure. Big buttons, clear text.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Light Mode dominant for trust/readability. Dark Mode optional for Worker App (night shifts).

heading_styles.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase text-primary

usage_rules: Primary (Black/Slate-900) for Sidebar, Headings, and Primary Buttons.
Accent (Gold #C5A059) for Active States, Highlights, and Top-Border of Cards.
Background (Slate-50) for the main dashboard canvas.
NEVER use Gold for text on White background (Contrast violation). Use Gold for borders/icons or text on Black.

container_styles.dashboard_card: bg-white border-t-4 border-accent shadow-sm rounded-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
container_styles.sidebar: bg-primary text-white w-64 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 overflow-y-auto hidden md:block

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-bold px-6 py-3 shadow-md border-b-2 border-accent
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90 rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-300 focus:border-accent focus:ring-accent rounded-sm h-12

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-sm overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:border-accent/50 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer rounded-sm

badges.success: bg-green-100 text-green-800 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.error: bg-red-100 text-red-800 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.neutral: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise texture on the dark sidebar to give it a 'premium paper' feel if possible.

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'Square' variants where possible to match the industrial theme.

motion.loading: Use a Gold progress bar or spinner.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Gold (#C5A059) is ONLY used on Black (#0F172A) or very dark backgrounds. On White, use a darker Gold/Bronze (#B45309) for text.
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Colors: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'palette' defined above.
2. Font Setup: Import 'Oswald' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. Layout: Build the 'Worker App' as a mobile-first PWA (Progressive Web App style) - Bottom Navigation for mobile, Sidebar for Desktop.
4. Components: Override Shadcn defaults to match the 'Square/Sharp' aesthetic. Remove rounded-xl, use rounded-sm.
5. Dashboard: Use the 'Bento Grid' for the Employer/Admin dashboard overview.
6. Tables: Use 'Compact' density for Shift Rosters. Add 'Sticky Header' for long lists.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly, mainly for mobile nav or modals.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Component Reuse: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Export Conventions: Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
